calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda S. Forster, 13286.

Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Anthony Belmonte, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Suzanna Walsh, a/k/a Suzanne Walsh.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 5, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Yerba Buena Commons Residential Tenancy Agreement------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---3-Day Notice ot Pay Rent or Quit-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Proof of Service---------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Anthony Belmonte, and against defendant Suzanna Walsh, a/k/a Suzanne Walsh as follows:

Plaintiff Anthony Belmonte shall recover from defendant Suzanna Walsh, a/k/a Suzanne Walsh Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $1,201.18 and Costs in the amount of $410.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,611.18.

Plaintiff Anthony Belmonte is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 88 Perry Street, #304, San Francisco, CA 94107. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Off Calendar
